---
title: "About"
---

Salt of the Earth small town motorcyclist and conspiracy theorist "Delicious Louis." 

**Likes**: Jai Paul, Little Richard, lemurs, nature, seasonal candies, lime-flavored chips, Roblox, dogs, swimming, pasta, ceramics, Michael Jackson, broccoli, carrots, sour patch kids, birds, slushies, Motown, riesens, Jeremy Lin, Duke Kahanamoku, melons

**Dislikes**: mosquitoes, spiders, prunes, violence, Tom Jones, mushrooms, mold, cliques, saunas, (most) board games

![](./IMG_8003.jpg)
